name: Dolia

skills.name: Mermaid's Gift
skills.description:
Transforms into a mermaid while in water, reducing slow effects, recovering Health and Mana over time, and dealing area damage with Basic Attacks. 
Her Recovery skill changes to let her form a covenant with a teammate. Her Ultimate prioritizes resetting this teammate's skill cooldowns.

skills.name: Ode
skills.description: Unleashes soundwaves that deal damage and inflict slow. When in water, the last soundwave knocks back enemies.

skills.name: Wavemaker
skills.description: Creates a pool in the target direction, restoring Health and Mana to herself and teammates within. The pool disappears after she leaves it.

skills.name: Celestial Melody
skills.description: Resets the longest current skill cooldown of a teammate within range, transferring the cooldown to herself. Prioritizes covenant teammates.

skillsZh.name: 人魚之賜
skillsZh.description:
在水域(河道也視為水域)會變成人魚，減輕自己受到的減速效果，並持續回復生命值和法力值，同時普攻會變成範圍傷害。
【恢復】技能會變成特殊技能，可與選定隊友建立契約，使用大招時會優先重置契約隊友的技能冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 歡歌
skillsZh.description: 發出向外擴散的聲波，造成傷害和減速。在水域施放時，最後一道聲波還會擊退敵人。

skillsZh.name: 逐浪
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向製造一片水域，為水域內的隊友和自己回復生命值和法力值，朵莉亞離開水域後，水域就會消失。

skillsZh.name: 天籟
skillsZh.description: 重置範圍內一名隊友目前冷卻時間最長的技能，由自己承擔技能冷卻。優先對已締結契約的隊友生效。

tips: Build: Boots of Resistance, Dawnlight, Crimson Shadow - Redemption.
tipsZh: 朵莉亞（遊走）：梯度 S，勝率 46.18%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：抵抗之靴、旭日初光、極影・救贖.

patchHistory.change: Removed Skill 1's knockback effect on distant enemies.
patchHistory.detail: "Dolia's Skill 1 already damages and slows enemies in a wide area. By removing the knockback effect for distant targets, we aim to reduce her ability to poke and interrupt enemies."

patchHistory.change: Raised the base damage and bonus multiplier of her Skill 1 and Skill 2.
patchHistory.detail:
Raised the base damage and bonus multiplier of her Skill 1 and Skill 2.
Dolia is currently underperforming, so we're boosting the stats of some of her skills and giving her an extra benefit for refreshing her teammates' skills.Hopefully this will make her more powerful and help her progress faster.

patchHistoryZh.change: 移除1技能對遠處敵人的擊退效果
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「朵莉亞的1技能可以造成大範圍的傷害和減速效果，我們適當回收遠端的控制效果，以降低她的消耗和打斷能力。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提高1技能和2技能的基礎傷害和加成係數
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提高1技能和2技能的基礎傷害和加成係數
朵莉亞在目前版本的表現稍嫌普通，我們希望透過提升她部分技能的數值，並強化她重置友方英雄技能後的收益。藉此讓她獲得更高的戰鬥力和成長速度。

faqs.question: Is Dolia good in current season?
faqs.answer: Dolia is Tier S Support with 46.18% win rate, 1.71% pick rate, and 0.45% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Dolia build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Resistance, Dawnlight, Crimson Shadow - Redemption, Frigid Charge, Eye of the Phoenix, Ominous Premonition.

faqs.question: How to counter Dolia?
faqs.answer: Pick Sima Yi, Guiguzi. Strong into Dun, Yaria.

faqsZh.question: 朵莉亞 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 朵莉亞 為 S 梯度，勝率 46.18%、選取 1.71%、禁用 0.45%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 朵莉亞 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：抵抗之靴、旭日初光、極影・救贖、冰霜衝擊、不死鳥之眼、不祥徵兆.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 朵莉亞？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Sima Yi、Guiguzi。朵莉亞 克制 Dun、Yaria。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Dun, Yaria. Weak into: Sima Yi, Guiguzi.

guide.overview: Dolia is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 46.1% win rate and 1.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Dolia: Dolia takes on mermaid form when in water (rivers are also considered water), reducing the slows taken by 50% and returning life and mana every second.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of the Arcane, Dawnlight, Venomous Staff, then complete Sage's Sanctuary, Succubus Cloak. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Dolia's Support kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Ode → Wavemaker → Celestial Melody → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Celestial Melody (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Ode, and Celestial Melody on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Ode → Wavemaker → Celestial Melody → weave basic attacks

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Dolia is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 0.5% — expect Dolia to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Dolia vs Cai Yan (Support, Tier S): Cai Yan is 1.3% pick / 50.3% WR. Cai Yan wins 4.3% more often globally. Choose Dolia when you need Roaming identity; choose Cai Yan for Roaming comfort.
Dolia vs Yaria (Support, Tier S): Yaria is 1.1% pick / 48.0% WR. Yaria wins 2.0% more often globally. Choose Dolia when you need Roaming identity; choose Yaria for Roaming comfort.

matchups.summary: Dolia excels into Dun, Yaria. Avoid blind picking into Sima Yi, Guiguzi without team peel.
